product_overview: A mobile-first Next.js application that lets citizens access municipal services (property tax, complaints, notifications), authenticate via OTP, and view a unified dashboard with quick service shortcuts. All backend interactions are mocked for frontend-driven end-to-end flows.
core_goals: Access and navigate municipal services from a central dashboard
Authenticate using a mobile number and 4-digit OTP to reach authenticated pages
Search property records and complete a mocked property tax payment
Submit and review civic complaints, and track complaint history
View municipal notifications and application status updates

features.name: Splash Screen Navigation
features.description: Animated landing experience that introduces the app and leads users into the login flow.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Wait for splash animation to complete (approx 1.5s) -> Tap CTA to proceed -> See /login load and login heading visible

features.name: OTP Login
features.description: Authenticate by entering a 10-digit mobile number, receiving a mocked 4-digit OTP, and verifying to access authenticated pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter a valid 10-digit mobile number -> Send OTP -> Enter a 4-digit OTP -> Submit OTP for verification -> See loading spinner -> Be redirected to /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Attempt to send OTP with empty mobile input -> Observe send action remains disabled

features.name: Dashboard Quick Services
features.description: Landing area after login that surfaces quick service shortcuts, notices, and application status badges for fast access to common tasks.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View quick services section and important notices -> Select the property tax service from quick services -> Be redirected to /property-tax -> Navigate back to /dashboard -> Select the complaints service from quick services -> Be redirected to /complaints

features.name: Property Tax Payment
features.description: A three-step, mocked flow to search a property by ID, review tax details, and complete a simulated payment with confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /property-tax -> Enter property ID in search input -> Submit property search -> View property details and tax breakdown -> Initiate payment -> Observe processing state -> See payment success confirmation with receipt number
Navigate to /property-tax -> Attempt to submit search with empty property ID -> Observe search action remains disabled

features.name: Complaint Registration
features.description: Submit new civic complaints through a guided form and switch to a tab view to review existing (mocked) complaint history.
user_flows: Navigate to /complaints -> Confirm 'New complaint' tab is active by default -> Select a complaint category -> Enter complaint description -> Enter complaint location -> Submit the complaint -> Observe submitting state -> See success confirmation 'complaint submitted' -> Switch to 'My complaints' tab -> See listed mock complaints with status badges

features.name: Notifications List
features.description: A paged list showing municipal notifications categorized by alert, success, and info with unread indicators and timestamps.
user_flows: Navigate to /notifications -> View the list of notifications -> Observe unread dot on unread notification -> Inspect notification types and date stamps

features.name: Bottom Navigation
features.description: Persistent bottom tab bar that enables quick switching between authenticated pages (dashboard, services, complaints, notifications/profile).
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Observe BottomNav present -> Use BottomNav to go to /services -> Use BottomNav to go to /complaints -> Use BottomNav to go to /notifications -> Use BottomNav to go to /profile

tech_stack.ui_library: Vanilla CSS with CSS custom properties

routes.description: Animated splash screen with CTA button to navigate to login
OTP-based login - enter mobile number, receive OTP, verify to access dashboard
Main dashboard with quick services tray, notices, and application status
3-step property tax payment flow - search, view details, pay
Submit new civic complaints and view existing complaint history
List of municipal notifications - alerts, success messages, and info
Full list of all available municipal services

features.name: Splash Screen Navigation
features.description: Animated landing splash screen that transitions to login on button click
user_interactions: Wait for splash animation phases to complete (approx 1.5s)
View animated logo and title text appearing

features.name: OTP Login
features.description: Mobile number input followed by a 4-digit OTP verification to log in
user_interactions: Enter digits in OTP input fields

features.name: Dashboard Quick Services
features.description: Dashboard home page showing quick service shortcuts and municipal notices
user_interactions: View "त्वरित सेवा" section with 4 service cards
Click "मालमत्ता कर" card to navigate to /property-tax
Click "तक्रार नोंदणी" card to navigate to /complaints
View "तुमचा अर्ज स्थिती" application status section with badges
Use BottomNav to switch between pages

features.name: Property Tax Payment
features.description: 3-step flow to search property, view tax details, and complete payment
user_interactions: Enter property ID in search input
View mocked property details (owner name, address, tax breakdown)
View payment success confirmation with receipt number

features.name: Complaint Registration
features.description: Submit new civic complaints via a form and view existing complaints in a tab view
user_interactions: View "नवीन तक्रार" tab active by default
Switch to "माझ्या तक्रारी" tab to view history
See mock complaints C-1092 and C-0845 with status badges

features.name: Notifications List
features.description: View municipal notifications categorized as alert, success, and info
user_interactions: See blue unread dot indicator on unread notification

features.name: Bottom Navigation
features.description: Persistent tab bar for navigating between authenticated pages
user_interactions: Click Home tab to navigate to /dashboard
Click Services tab to navigate to /services
Click Complaints tab to navigate to /complaints

known_limitations.issue: OTP login is fully mocked - any 10-digit number and any 4 OTP digits work
Property tax payment is mocked - no real payment gateway
Complaint submission is mocked - data not persisted to backend
known_limitations.impact: Form submit always succeeds after timeout

known_limitations.issue: All data (notices, application status, complaints) is hardcoded mock data
